title: The Misato Katsuragi News Project PS3
display_title: The Misato Katsuragi News Project PS3
wikitext:
[]: The Misato Katsuragi News Project (PS3)             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Mon May 25, 2009 10:12 pm According to info found here: http://forums.gametrailers.com/thread/new-ps3-game-developed-being-b/819657 Apparently ad with the new bluray release or such has first info on upcoming PS3 Evangelion game underneath advertisement of the one coming soon for PSP/PS2.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon May 25, 2009 10:24 pm Freaking PS3. Sounds cool if not for my dislike of the PS3.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 25, 2009 10:37 pm Cool. I'd like for it to be dubbed but I doubt that's going to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Mon May 25, 2009 11:00 pm I doubt it unless Funi's Rebuild sales like crazy.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon May 25, 2009 11:08 pm Dare I say it but FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF I have a 360

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon May 25, 2009 11:27 pm That's ok, we have achievements. But ever since the end of the Sega systems, Eva games have favored Sony. POST 1000

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Tue May 26, 2009 3:29 am Nice! I can't wait to see pictures. They use the rare word "katachi" (beauty, aesthetic, perfection...) to describe it, just like they're doing with the new game for the PSP & PS2 game based on Rebuild 1.0. It might be an adaptation of that, or maybe a new game based on Rebuil 2.0. PS3 has trophies, by the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue May 26, 2009 3:33 am Tear....i still gotta get a PS3. My last film took too much of my "Fun Money"

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue May 26, 2009 4:19 am Lleonard Pler wrote: They use the rare word "katachi" (beauty, aesthetic, perfection...) to describe it, just like they're doing with the new game for the PSP & PS2 game based on Rebuild 1.0. It might be an adaptation of that, or maybe a new game based on Rebuil 2.0

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue May 26, 2009 5:03 am Real time gender change!

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue May 26, 2009 5:13 am I hope it's not another "Visual Novel" or text heavy game, because I would like to be able to actually play it instead of stumbling randomly through menues and not having a clue as to what's going on. And that's assuming the game is actually worth playing, let alone importing.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Tue May 26, 2009 6:31 am Well, I've said this before, and I'll say it again. I am yet to find an Evangelion game that I have thought to be worth buying, (coming from somebody who has NO knowledged of Japanese, thus cannot enjoy these massive text based games.) Either way, if I do end up getting a ps3, the game is good, and understandable, I'll get it, but if not. Forget about.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue May 26, 2009 6:40 am If I could get it at a decent price I may pick up Evangelion 64 for the sheer purpose of novelty and as a collectible, but it's not a game that I'd call good by any stretch of the imagination. I wish someone would freaking make a good Evangelion game already, but I doubt it's going to happen any time soon. Ironically, our best bet for a good Evangelion game might actually be the video game tie in for LAEM. That probably won't turn out well either, but statistically the odds of a movie-based game being good are much higher than with TV shows.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Tue May 26, 2009 6:46 am ^Maybe, either way, at least it would be in English. I would've done the ame thing about Eva 64, but I've already emulated it and I'd rather not have to go out and buy a Japanese N64. Unless its region free or something?

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Tue May 26, 2009 7:37 am The good thing to me is how easy it is to import ps3 games. Nothing special to do, it auto works on any regions ps3, so this is going to be an instant import

[]:             Quote Post by Evayo » Tue May 26, 2009 9:14 am Why must good games always be released for consoles I don't have?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue May 26, 2009 11:16 am I hope we get a Xbox360 port or something. I really hope this comes to the USA seeing that Funi has the dubbing rights to the Rebuild series.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Tue May 26, 2009 11:21 am Game is being developed by Cellius, which is a joint development team of Sony and Namco/Bandai. The software they make will be Sony exclusive and mainly for use on PS3, as that was the intention of the creation of this group.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue May 26, 2009 11:25 am Good thing I have a PS3. I hope Bandai and Funi can make a deal to release this in the States.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue May 26, 2009 11:50 am Zaiku wrote: Well, I've said this before, and I'll say it again. I am yet to find an Evangelion game that I have thought to be worth buying, (coming from somebody who has NO knowledged of Japanese, thus cannot enjoy these massive text based games.)
